keyFeatures.en: Generate true random numbers for various purposes
keyFeatures.zh: 生成用于各种目的的真实随机数

keyFeatures.en: Provide secure and unpredictable random numbers
keyFeatures.zh: 提供安全且不可预测的随机数

description.en: Unlimited random numbers for non-commercial use
description.zh: 非商业用途的无限随机数

targetAudience.en: Individuals and organizations needing random numbers for non-commercial purposes
targetAudience.zh: 需要非商业用途随机数的个人和组织

positioning.en: A trusted source for true random numbers
positioning.zh: 真实随机数值得信赖的来源
